title: Minecraft Dungeons Artifacts [READ DESC]
description: Adds new artifact mob drops and loads of other stuff!
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3877e02c3132e7de6bd0ccc4dfac0617882cade.png)

Artifacts can be dropped by different mobs. Currently, there are over 20 artifacts.


<details>
<summary>Drops</summary>

![Drop Rates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/520285fd5198413a21f9ed35a41bbaf28b3cb06e.png)


</details>


Rare artifacts are slightly more powerful than the common versions, so it's worth getting your hands on them. They are harder to come by than common artifacts, but you obtain them the same way.


<details>
<summary>Souls and Scythes</summary>

With the new Souls and Scythes, a new biome and boss has been added. The Reaper. It can be locaed in the overworld, in the Soul Castle, which is located in the Soul Sand Plains.

</details>

!!!NOTICE!!! 
## THIS MOD IS NO LONGER BEING WORKED ON. [READ BELOW]


<details>
<summary>Arcane Artifacts</summary>

![Future](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07db1240838fb304ecbdd5e6dc07e5c70969c2ca_0.webp)
![?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8adae3eb1a3011cf2988b4327cc8a7fb74cbadb.png)
## ARCANE ARTIFACTS WILL BE OUT THIS WEEK, FROM THE 10th-16th, DUE TO MODRINTH HAVING TO APPROVE THE MOD.
When approved, this will be the link;
  [new mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/arcane-artifacts)

</details>
